revision_history.description: New data model format and notation; add IdentifyType

cluster_id.name: Identify
cluster_id.summary: Provides a mechanism for a device to indicate its identity, often visually or audibly. This is typically used for commissioning or locating a device. The IdentifyTypeEnum specifies the type of identification presentation.

classification.summary: This classification indicates that the Identify cluster is a fundamental, utility-oriented cluster operating at the endpoint level, providing basic identification functionality for a device.

values.name: LightOutput
values.summary: Light output of a lighting product.

values.name: Display
values.summary: Presentation will be visible on display screen.

values.name: Actuator
values.summary: Presentation will be conveyed by actuator functionality such as through a window blind operation or in-wall relay.

values.name: Blink
values.summary: e.g., Light is turned on/off once.

values.name: Breathe
values.summary: e.g., Light is turned on/off over 1 second and repeated 15 times.

values.name: Okay
values.summary: e.g., Colored light turns green for 1 second; non-colored light flashes twice.

values.name: ChannelChange
values.summary: e.g., Colored light turns orange for 8 seconds; non-colored light switches to the maximum brightness for 0.5s and then minimum brightness for 7.5s.

values.name: FinishEffect
values.summary: Complete the current effect sequence before terminating. e.g., if in the middle of a breathe effect (as above), first complete the current 1s breathe effect and then terminate the effect.

values.name: StopEffect
values.summary: Terminate the effect as soon as possible.

values.name: Default
values.summary: Indicates the default effect is used

attributes.name: IdentifyTime
attributes.summary: Represents remaining time (seconds) endpoint identifies itself. Non-zero value initiates identification state (RECOMMENDED flashing light 0.5s period), decrementing every second. Reaching or setting to 0 terminates identification state.

attributes.name: IdentifyType
attributes.summary: Indicates how identification state is presented to the user. SHALL contain one of the values defined in IdentifyTypeEnum. 'None' SHALL NOT be used if device capable of other methods.

commands.name: Identify
commands.summary: This command starts or stops the receiving device identifying itself by setting the IdentifyTime attribute.

fields.name: IdentifyTime
fields.summary: Represents the length of time, in seconds, the endpoint will identify itself. Setting to 0 terminates identification.

commands.effect_on_receipt:
set IdentifyTime_attribute := IdentifyTime_field_value
if IdentifyTime_attribute != 0 then
  device.identification_state := ACTIVE
  start_timer(1s, decrement_IdentifyTime_attribute)
else
  device.identification_state := INACTIVE
  stop_timer(decrement_IdentifyTime_attribute)
end if

commands.name: TriggerEffect
commands.summary: This command allows the support of feedback to the user, such as a certain light effect, distinct from the identify mechanism.

fields.name: EffectIdentifier
fields.summary: Indicates the identify effect to use. All non-reserved values of EffectIdentifierEnum SHALL be supported.

fields.name: EffectVariant
fields.summary: Indicates which variant of the effect SHOULD be triggered. If not supported, the default variant SHALL be used.

commands.effect_on_receipt:
if device.supports_effect_variant(EffectIdentifier_field, EffectVariant_field) then
  device.execute_effect(EffectIdentifier_field, EffectVariant_field)
else
  device.execute_effect(EffectIdentifier_field, EffectIdentifier_field.default_variant)
end if

references.name: ClusterRevision
references.description: Global attribute whose value SHALL be the highest revision number in the cluster's revision history table (not defined in this section).

references.name: Data Model Specification
references.description: Base types like enum8 and uint16 are defined in the Matter Data Model Specification.

references.name: ClusterRevision attribute
references.description: A global attribute mentioned in the revision history, likely defined in the Matter Data Model Specification.

references.name: IdentifyTypeEnum
references.description: An enumeration defining the possible ways an identification state can be presented to the user, used by the IdentifyType attribute.

references.name: Groups Cluster
references.description: Manages endpoint group membership and related commands.
